zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理等待方向选择
zh.content:
短期XRP/美元整体呈震荡偏弱结构，价格围绕1.04一线运行，未能有效站上SMA20均线1.045，显示多头动能不足，市场进入整理等待方向选择信号偏弱但未破位

技术指标方面，MACD柱值维持小幅负值，空头动能仍占主导但未明显放大，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限，短线以震荡修复为主动能偏弱延续

支撑位关注1.033附近前低区域，若跌破可能进一步测试1.02整数关口；上方阻力在1.045与1.06一带，突破需量能配合确认

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，未突破1.045前不宜追多，反弹可轻仓试空，跌破1.033后顺势跟进空单并严格止损控制风险短线灵活调整观察为主

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation phase after a short period of indecision around the 1.04 handle. Price action remains tightly compressed, suggesting low volatility and a balance between buyers and sellers. Despite a slight 24-hour uptick, the broader structure leans neutral-to-slightly bearish as the market struggles to reclaim the 20-period moving average. Momentum lacks conviction, indicating traders are awaiting a clearer directional catalyst.

The technical indicators reinforce the current lack of bullish momentum. Price is trading just below the SMA(20) at 1.045154, signaling short-term resistance overhead. The MACD remains in negative territory at -0.0042, suggesting bearish momentum is still present, albeit weakening. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on moving averages and MACD, both indicating that upside continuation requires stronger volume confirmation. Overall bias remains cautiously neutral.

Immediate support is forming near the session low at 1.03304, with a psychological floor around 1.030 that may attract dip buyers if tested. A break below this zone could expose 1.025 as the next downside extension. On the upside, resistance is first encountered at the SMA(20) near 1.045, followed by a stronger barrier at 1.050 and then 1.060, where prior supply pressure has historically emerged.

Given the current compression, range-trading strategies are favored, with scalpers considering longs near 1.033–1.035 and partial profit-taking into the 1.045 resistance zone. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 1.045 to target 1.050–1.060, while maintaining strict stops below 1.033. Conversely, a breakdown below support could justify short positions toward 1.025. Risk management remains essential due to low volatility and potential false breakouts in either direction.
